Sweet Daisy, the fairest duck I ever met
Each flaxen lock a rush of flowing gold
Her bill the color of summer sunset
Exquisite plumes, a wonder to behold

data.name: Sisu

abilities.name: Surge of Power
abilities.text: This character gets +1 {Strength} for each card in opponents' hands.

data.flavor_text:
Sometimes the only way to fight the unimaginable
is with the incredible.

keywords.name: Shift 6
keywords.text: (You may pay 6 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Sisu.)

abilities.name: I Got This!
abilities.text: When you play this character, banish all opposing characters with 2 {Strength} or less.

data.name: Tong

keywords.name: Reckless
keywords.text: (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)

data.flavor_text: "I too wish to join this fellowship of Druun butt-kickery."

keywords.name: Evasive
keywords.text: (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

abilities.name: On a Roll
abilities.text: When you play this character, you may move him and one of your other characters to the same location for free. The other character gets +2 {Strength} this turn.

data.name: A Pirate's Life

keywords.name: Sing Together 6
keywords.text: (Any number of your or your teammates' characters with total cost 6 or more may {Exert} to sing this song for free.)

rules: Each opponent loses 2 lore. You gain 2 lore.
data.flavor_text:
Give me a career
As a buccaneer

data.name: Be King Undisputed
rules: (A character with cost 4 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Each opponent chooses and banishes one of their characters.
data.flavor_text: Respected, saluted

data.name: Brawl
rules: Banish chosen character with 2 {Strength} or less.
data.flavor_text:
There are two ways to leave the Snuggly Duckling—
the door or the window.

data.name: Imperial Proclamation

abilities.name: Call to the Front
abilities.text: Whenever one of your characters challenges another character, you pay 1 {Ink} less for the next character you play this turn.

data.flavor_text:
"By order of the Emperor, one man from every family must
serve in the Imperial Army."
—Chi Fu

abilities.name: Discipline and Strength
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gets +2 {Strength} this turn. Whenever they challenge another character this turn, you may draw a card.

data.name: The Plank

abilities.name: Walk!
abilities.text: {Exert} — Choose one: • Banish chosen Hero character. • Ready chosen Villain character. They can't quest for the rest of this turn.

data.flavor_text: It's a once-in-a-lifetime view.

abilities.name: Extract of Ruby
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gains Rush and gets +2 {Strength} this turn. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)

abilities.name: Routine Ruckus
abilities.text: Whenever a character with 3 {Strength} or more challenges another character while here, gain 1 lore. If the challenging character has 6 {Strength} or more, gain 3 lore instead.

abilities.name: Strength of Mind
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character here gets +1 {Strength} this turn.

data.name: Anna

abilities.name: I Was Born Ready
abilities.text: If you have another Hero character in play, this character gets +1 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text:
After talking to Olaf, Anna marched into the
unexpected storm to save Kristoff.

data.name: Anna

abilities.name: Let Me Help You
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, your other Hero characters get +1 {Lore} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
Make sure you know what's truly important and be
willing to fight for it.

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

abilities.name: The Girl Who Has Everything
abilities.text: While you have more items in play than each opponent, this character gets +2 {Lore}.

keywords.name: Shift 2
keywords.text: (You may pay 2 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Aurora.)

abilities.name: Preserver
abilities.text: Opponents can't choose your items for abilities or effects.

abilities.name: Royal Inventory
abilities.text: {Exert} — Look at the top card of your deck and put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.

data.name: Aurora

keywords.name: Ward
keywords.text: (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text:
Her music fills the Illuminary's gardens with joy
and light.

data.name: Dang Hu

abilities.name: You Better Talk Fast
abilities.text: Your other Villain characters gain Support. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text: You can find villainy in the most unexpected places.

data.name: Fa Li
data.flavor_text:
When far from home, Mulan often thinks of her
calming presence.

data.name: Flounder

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: I'm Not a Guppy
abilities.text: If you have a character named Ariel in play, you pay 1 {Ink} less to play this character.

data.flavor_text: "Ariel, Ariel! You won't believe what I found!"

data.name: Hades
data.flavor_text:
"This neat little scheme has Ursula's tentacles all
over it. That sneaky sea witch...Wait! I can use
this. She can keep those obnoxious Illumineers
busy while I roll out my own plan."

data.name: Hans

abilities.name: Royal Schemes
abilities.text: When you play this character, if a Princess or Queen character is in play, gain 1 lore.

data.flavor_text:
Hans was confident he could bring Anna to Ursula—
all he needed was something of Kristoff's to lure
her in.

data.name: Iduna

abilities.name: Enduring Love
abilities.text: When this character is banished, you may put this card into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.flavor_text:
"Come my darling, homeward bound
When all is lost, then all is found."

data.name: John Silver
data.flavor_text:
"Strange things be at the edge of the map: sea
witches, entangled glimmers, and whatnot. I'll stay
with me ship, thank you."

keywords.name: Shift: Discard an item card
keywords.text: (You may discard an item card to play this on top of one of your characters named Olaf.)

abilities.name: Carrots All Around!
abilities.text: Whenever he quests, each of your other characters gets +{Strength} equal to this character's {Strength} this turn.

data.name: Olaf

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

data.flavor_text:
"Isn't this Kristoff's hat? If he went this way, he'll
be caught in that storm!"

data.name: Pascal

abilities.name: Colorful Tactics
abilities.text: When you play this character, look at the top 3 cards of your deck and put them back in any order.

data.flavor_text:
If you want to find something hidden, get someone
who's an expert at hiding.

keywords.name: Support
keywords.text: (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {Strength} to another chosen character's {Strength} this turn.)

abilities.name: Best Defense
abilities.text: Whenever one of your characters is chosen for Support, they gain Resist +1 this turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

data.name: Rapunzel

abilities.name: Perceptive Partner
abilities.text: While you have a character named Pascal in play, this character gains Ward. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

data.flavor_text: "Pascal! A new flower for the wall!"

data.name: Scuttle

abilities.name: Let Me See
abilities.text: When you play this character, look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal an item card and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.flavor_text: "Wow. This is special. This is very, very unusual."

data.name: Sisu
data.flavor_text:
"It may feel impossible, but sometimes, you just
have to take the first step, even before you're
ready."

data.name: The Queen

abilities.name: Consult the Spellbook
abilities.text: {Exert} — Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal an item card and put it into your hand. If that item costs 3 or less, you may play it for free instead and it enters play exerted. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.source: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

data.name: Transformed Chef

abilities.name: A Culinary Masterpiece
abilities.text: When you play this character, remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.

data.flavor_text:
"A good, hot meal will set you right as rain."
—Mrs. Potts

keywords.name: Shift 6
keywords.text: (You may pay 6 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Triton.)

abilities.name: Imposing Presence
abilities.text: Opposing characters get -1 {Strength} for each location you have in play.

data.name: Triton

abilities.name: Consign to the Depths
abilities.text: {Exert} — Gain 3 lore.

data.flavor_text: "If this is the only way, so be it."

abilities.name: Superior Swimmer
abilities.text: During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

abilities.name: Keeper of Atlantica
abilities.text: Whenever one of your locations is banished, you may put that card into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.name: Tuk Tuk
data.flavor_text:
"Some say he's easily distracted. They're not
wrong..."
—Raya

data.name: Dig a Little Deeper

keywords.name: Sing Together 8
keywords.text: (Any number of your or your teammates' characters with total cost 8 or more may {Exert} to sing this song for free.)

rules: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck. Put 2 into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

data.name: Glean
rules: Banish chosen item. Its player gains 2 lore.
data.flavor_text:
"This could be just the thing I need to get my invention
working."

data.name: Seldom All They Seem
rules: (A character with cost 2 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen character gets -3 {Strength} this turn.
data.flavor_text:
I know you
I walked with you once upon a dream

data.name: Treasures Untold
rules: (A character with cost 6 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Return up to 2 item cards from your discard into your hand.
data.flavor_text: How many wonders can one cavern hold?

abilities.name: Icy Defense
abilities.text: Whenever you play a character, they gain Resist +1 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

abilities.name: Asleep
abilities.text: This item enters play exerted.

abilities.name: Awaken
abilities.text: {Exert} — Put a character card from your discard into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

data.name: Ice Block

abilities.name: Chilly Labor
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character gets -1 {Strength} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
Frozen ink can be harvested and processed to many useful
ends.

abilities.name: Treasure Trove
abilities.text: While you have 3 or more items in play, this location gets +2 {Lore}.

abilities.name: Help the Wounded
abilities.text: Whenever a character quests while here, remove up to 2 damage from them. If they're a Hero character, remove up to 4 damage instead.

keywords.name: Shift: Discard a location card
keywords.text: (You may discard a location card to play this on top of one of your characters named Aladdin.)

abilities.name: Crashing Through
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, you may banish chosen item.

data.name: Aladdin
data.flavor_text:
"How about we cut to the part where I make a
quick escape and you yell after me? No? Can't say
I didn't give you a chance."

data.name: Arges
data.flavor_text:
"Looks like you got some big feelings there,
buddy—let's stomp 'em out!"
—Hades

data.name: Ariel

abilities.name: I Want More
abilities.text: Whenever you play a song, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

data.flavor_text: Everything she's ever wanted is almost in reach.

keywords.name: Shift 4
keywords.text: (You may pay 4 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Ariel.)

abilities.name: Amplified Voice
abilities.text: Whenever you play a song, you may pay 2 {Ink} to deal 3 damage to chosen character.

data.name: Beast

keywords.name: Resist +1
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

data.flavor_text: He's even tougher than he looks.

data.name: Chi-Fu

abilities.name: Overly Cautious
abilities.text: While this character has no damage, he gets +2 {Lore}.

data.flavor_text:
"You, there! Keep that fighting away from here! It
is imperative that I write to the Emperor."

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

data.name: Donald Duck

abilities.name: Boarding Party
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever this character banishes a character in a challenge, your other characters get +1 {Lore} this turn.

data.flavor_text:
Nobody stands a chance against the daring duck
of the high seas!

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

keywords.name: Resist +1
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

abilities.name: I Learned from the Best
abilities.text: During your turn, you may play this character for free if an opposing character was banished in a challenge this turn.

data.name: Li Shang
data.flavor_text:
Immovable as a mountain and fierce as a dragon—
the Empire's finest warrior.

data.name: Ling

abilities.name: Full of Spirit
abilities.text: Your Hero characters get +1 {Strength}.

data.flavor_text: A good friend is handy in a fight.

data.name: Luisa Madrigal

abilities.name: I'm the Strong One
abilities.text: While you have another character in play, this character gets +2 {Strength}.

data.flavor_text:
There's no way Ursula's creatures are getting to
that donkey.

data.name: Magic Broom

abilities.name: Winged For a Day
abilities.text: During your turn, this character gains Evasive. (They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

data.flavor_text:
It spends its days keeping the treasured glimmers
in the Hall of Lorcana sparkling clean.

keywords.name: Resist +1
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

abilities.name: Army of Brooms
abilities.text: This character gets +2 {Strength} for each other character named Magic Broom you have in play.

keywords.name: Shift 3
keywords.text: (You may pay 3 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Mickey Mouse.)

keywords.name: Resist +1
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

abilities.name: Sweep Away
abilities.text: When you play this character, deal damage to chosen character equal to the number of Broom characters you have in play.

data.name: Mickey Mouse

abilities.name: Stand Strong
abilities.text: When you play this character, chosen character gains Challenger +2 this turn. (They get +2 {Strength} while challenging.)

data.flavor_text:
He sets the standard for intrepid adventurers
everywhere.

data.name: Mulan
data.flavor_text:
"Maybe what I really wanted was to prove I could
do things right, so when I looked in the mirror, I'd
see someone worthwhile."

abilities.name: You Gotta Stay Focused
abilities.text: Your Hero characters gain Challenger +1. (They get +1 {Strength} while challenging.)

abilities.name: Shameless Promoter
abilities.text: Whenever you play a Hero character, gain 1 lore.

keywords.name: Resist +1
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

abilities.name: Not So Small Anymore
abilities.text: While you have no cards in your hand, this character can challenge ready characters.

data.name: Rajah

abilities.name: Steady Gaze
abilities.text: While you have no cards in your hand, characters with cost 4 or less can't challenge this character.

data.flavor_text: As regal as his namesake and just as powerful.

keywords.name: Challenger +2
keywords.text: (While challenging, this character gets +2 {Strength}.)

keywords.name: Resist +2
keywords.text: (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 2.)

abilities.name: You Gave It Your Best
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, you may draw a card.

data.name: Yao

keywords.name: Challenger +2
keywords.text: (While challenging, this character gets +2 {Strength}.)

data.flavor_text:
"I'm gonna hit you so hard, it'll make your
ancestors dizzy."

data.name: Avalanche
rules: Deal 1 damage to each opposing character. You may banish chosen location.
data.flavor_text: A little snow never hurt anyone. That big rock, however...

data.name: I Find 'Em, I Flatten 'Em
rules: (A character with cost 4 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Banish all items.
data.flavor_text:
I don't ask how hard the work is
Got a rough, indestructible surface

data.name: One Last Hope
rules: (A character with cost 3 or more can {Exert} to sing this song for free.)
Chosen character gains Resist +2 until the start of your next turn. If a Hero character is chosen, they may also challenge ready characters this turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

data.name: The Mob Song

keywords.name: Sing Together 10
keywords.text: (Any number of your or your teammates' characters with total cost 10 or more may {Exert} to sing this song for free.)

rules: Deal 3 damage to up to 3 chosen characters and/or locations.

data.name: Triton's Decree
rules: Each opponent chooses one of their characters and deals 2 damage to them.
data.flavor_text:
"Ursula's foul creatures are not welcome in my
kingdom!"

abilities.name: Resourceful
abilities.text: When you play this item, you may draw a card.

abilities.name: Extract of Steel
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen character of yours gains Bodyguard until the start of your next turn. (An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: Within Range
abilities.text: {Exert} — Chosen Hero character gains Challenger +2 and Evasive this turn. (They get +2 {Strength} while challenging. They can challenge characters with Evasive.)

data.name: RLS Legacy's Cannon

abilities.name: Ba-boom!
abilities.text: {Exert} — Deal 2 damage to chosen character or location.

data.flavor_text:
"So help me, I'll use the ship's cannons to blast ya all to
kingdom come!"
—John Silver

abilities.name: Protect the Realm
abilities.text: While you have an exerted character here, your other locations can't be challenged.

abilities.name: If You Can Make It Here...
abilities.text: During your turn, whenever a character banishes another character in a challenge while here, gain 2 lore.

keywords.name: Singer 9
keywords.text: (This character counts as cost 9 to sing songs.)

abilities.name: Beautiful Voice
abilities.text: Whenever this character sings a song, your other Princess characters get +1 {Lore} this turn.

keywords.name: Bodyguard
keywords.text: (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

abilities.name: Dramatic Entrance
abilities.text: When you play this character, banish chosen opposing character with 5 {Strength} or more.

data.name: Look at This Family

keywords.name: Sing Together 7
keywords.text: (Any number of your or your teammates' characters with total cost 7 or more may {Exert} to sing this song for free.)

rules: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may reveal up to 2 character cards and put them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

keywords.text: (You may pay 5 {Ink} to play this on top of one of your characters named Ursula.)

abilities.name: Now I Am the Ruler!
abilities.text: Whenever this character quests, exert chosen character.

abilities.name: You'll Listen to Me!
abilities.text: Other characters can't exert to sing songs.

abilities.text: When you play this character, if you have a character named Magic Broom in play, you may draw a card.

abilities.name: Arcane Study
abilities.text: While you have 2 or more Broom characters in play, this character gets +2 {Lore}.

rules: Chosen player draws 5 cards.

abilities.text: When you play this character and whenever she's challenged, each opponent chooses and discards a card.
